summary: Complete testing of CheckIn page Client/Staff flow. Backend: 11/11 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All 6 tests pass - Client/Staff buttons visible, Staff role selection grid with 4 positions (DJ, Bartender, Server, Manager), Back button functionality, Client triggers location request, Staff roles trigger location request, DJ redirects to /dj panel.
critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/user/profile/{user_id} correctly updates role and staff_title fields
Partial updates work correctly - updating only role preserves staff_title and vice versa
CheckInPage.jsx correctly implements Client/Staff selection flow
Staff position buttons have correct data-testid attributes (staff-position-dj, staff-position-bartender, staff-position-server, staff-position-manager)
Back button (data-testid='back-to-type-btn') correctly returns to initial Client/Staff view
DJ selection correctly redirects to /dj page via navigate('/dj')
Other staff roles (bartender, server, manager) correctly trigger location permission request
Client selection correctly triggers location permission request and saves role='customer' to profile
API_URL correctly uses window.location.origin for API calls
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user ec0e3093-fe70-4103-bfff-04975859c474 for role update tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: CheckIn page flow fully tested. Key data-testids: checkin-client-btn, checkin-staff-btn, staff-position-dj, staff-position-bartender, staff-position-server, staff-position-manager, back-to-type-btn. PUT /api/user/profile/{user_id} accepts {role, staff_title} in body. DJ selection redirects to /dj, other staff roles trigger location permission. Note: Service worker caching may cause stale UI - clearing cookies/cache resolves this.

GET /api/user/profile/{user_id}.details: Returns user profile with role and staff_title fields

PUT /api/user/profile/{user_id}.details: Updates role and staff_title fields, supports partial updates

CheckIn Page - Client/Staff buttons.details: Both buttons visible with correct data-testid attributes

CheckIn Page - Staff role selection.details: 4 position buttons (DJ, Bartender, Server, Manager) with emojis

CheckIn Page - Staff flow (non-DJ).details: Saves role to profile and triggers location permission

CheckIn Page - DJ flow.details: Saves role to profile and redirects to /dj page

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All requested features working as expected
